title: Commerce-meeting quiz — Rankett pricing-research, Nov 2025
html:
TL;DR

  • A 5-question survey Yahir wrote for an Austin-area Commerce meeting (Nov 2 2025) to validate Rankett pricing with real local SMBs:
    1. What kind of business do you own? (text box)
    2. Do you see the value in ranking 1st on AI search platforms?
    3. What's a FAIR price to receive weekly or monthly rank-tracking updates? — $10/mo, $30/mo, $50/mo.
    4. What's a fair price to get it all done for you — rank 1st on AI search in 30 days & hold? — $100/mo, $300/mo, $500/mo.
    5. Sign up for launch alert (phone or email).

Pricing-frame revealed

Tracking-only tier: $10–50/mo. Full-fulfillment tier: $100–500/mo. Anchor on the 30-day-to-rank-1 promise.

Why it matters in the graph

  • Earliest concrete pricing test for rankett in the corpus — predates the $2–4k/client agency-takeaway in 2026 01 02 diddles call by 2 months. The direct-to-SMB price is one tenth of the whitelabel-via-agency price — confirms the agency-channel is the higher-leverage GTM Yahir eventually picks.
  • The 30-day rank-1 promise is the performance-claim that drives all subsequent Rankett ops (whitelabel, fulfillment, share-of-voice scoring). First captured here.
  • Local Commerce-meeting as research venue — Yahir doing face-to-face SMB validation in Austin, not just online. Pairs with austin tx integration.
  • The 5th question (capture phone/email for launch) makes this also a lead-capture form — the survey is double-duty.

Open questions

  • What were the actual answers? Where's the response data?
  • "30 days to rank 1st on AI search" — feasibility-tested at this point or aspirational?
  • Did this survey get used at the Commerce meeting event, and what was the meeting?
